历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 40940 → 81369 → 74311 → 56573 → 53361. After a significant drop in 2022, it has been recovering year by year, with a cumulative forward shift of about 28,000 positions over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 53361. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 132 in 2021, 136 in 2022, 124 in 2023, 130 in 2024, and 159 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 200, an increase of 41 students (+25.8%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 131st in 2026, with fluctuations between 127 and 136 in recent years, overall stable. Its reputation has been steady recently, with no major public opinion incidents. On Douyin, its popularity ranks 72nd, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of 382,853, short video exposure at a medium-low level, and moderate application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has no A- or above disciplines, indicating moderate academic strength and limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, closely related to the university's enrollment majors, potentially attracting some candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 26,808 (+8.4%) compared to 2025, expanding the candidate pool. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, far from Hunan, and cross-province study willingness is affected by regional preferences, so local candidates' application interest is relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 53361, the significant expansion of 41 students (+25.8%) in 2026, and the increase of about 8.4% in Hunan Physics Category candidates, the expansion rate is significantly larger than the candidate growth rate, theoretically leading to a noticeable backward shift in ranking. However, due to the university's average level, remote location, and lack of A-class disciplines, actual application popularity may be slightly better than pure supply-demand elasticity predictions. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 61117, with a range of 60617–61617.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<60617), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (>61617), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors for a stable admission.
